text: MarketReel — Global Film DistributionTenetMarketing Campaign Strategy BriefMarketReel Intelligence Document 2020 Global Release StrategyStrategic OverviewTitleTenetRelease StrategyIMAX-first theatrical; pandemic-era wide release (2020); streaming re-release strategy distinctRecommended WindowSeptember (post-summer; theatrical re-launch); streaming any timeOTT StrategyHBO Max / Max exclusive post-theatrical; initial 45-day theatrical window (pandemic context); streaming positioned as 'watch again to understand'Estimated Marketing Spend115M USD (all territories)Target Audience SegmentsNolan fans (primary)Sci-fi enthusiastsIMAX format audiencesCinephiles / repeat-viewersCore Marketing HooksThe following narrative hooks have been identified as the film's primary marketing levers:Don't try to understand it — feel itChristopher Nolan's most ambitious filmThe ultimate IMAX experienceTime. Inverted.Territory Marketing Spend & StrategyTerritoryBudget (USD)Strategy NotesNorth America45MIMAX saturation; concept marketing; JDW star-making campaignUK15MNolan homeland; IMAX; Pattinson pressChina20MIMAX; mystery/spy genre popular; state cultural submission earlyJapan12MIMAX; Nolan auteur; sci-fi enthusiast pressIndia8MDimple Kapadia angle; IMAX; English Hindi dubSouth Korea6MCinephile market; IMAX; concept film positioningGermany5MPhilosophical sci-fi; IMAX Frankfurt/MunichAustralia4MIMAX; Nolan brandRelease Window RationaleRecommended theatrical release window: September (post-summer; theatrical re-launch); streaming any timeThis window has been selected based on competitive landscape analysis, historical box office performance for this genre in target territories, award season positioning requirements, and OTT platform licensing timeline needs.Digital & OTT StrategyHBO Max / Max exclusive post-theatrical; initial 45-day theatrical window (pandemic context); streaming positioned as 'watch again to understand'Digital marketing investment should be weighted toward territories with high mobile-first media consumption (India, Southeast Asia, Latin America, Africa). Social media platform prioritization: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube for 18-34; Facebook, YouTube for 35; WeChat, Weibo, Douyin for China-region.PR & Talent StrategyPrincipal cast: John David Washington, Robert Pattinson, Elizabeth Debicki, Kenneth Branagh, Dimple KapadiaPress tour sequencing recommendation: Begin with home-market press junket (North America/UK), followed by sequential territory visits prioritized by theatrical revenue projection. Virtual press events are recommended for long-tail territory coverage. Influencer partnerships should be activated 4 weeks prior to theatrical release date in each territory.Awards Campaign NotesIf this title is positioned for awards consideration, the following additional investments are recommended: screener distribution to eligible voters (Academy, BAFTA, HFPA), FYC advertising in trade publications (Variety, Hollywood Reporter, Screen International), and targeted awards-season theatrical runs in qualifying markets (Los Angeles, New York, London minimum).MarketReel Confidential — Tenet Marketing Strategy — For Internal Distribution Use Only
